---
title: "Your Title Here"
author:
  - name: "Your Name"
    affiliation: "Your Institution"
    orcid: "0000-0000-0000-0000"
date: last-modified
abstract: |
  Brief description of what this paper does and why it matters.
  Replace this with your actual abstract.
bibliography: references.bib
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    toc: true
---

Your paper goes here. Structure it however makes sense.

```{python}
#| echo: true

# Your code here
print("Hello from Working Papers in Critical Search")
```

## References

::: {#refs}
:::
